findings.summary: Mechanical:Mechanical_Shape components misclassified as speaker, transformer, and relay

incorrect.description: SP1/SP2/SP3 (spacers, Mechanical:Mechanical_Shape) are typed 'speaker'; TI1/TI2/TI3 (threaded inserts, Mechanical:Mechanical_Shape) typed 'transformer'; KN1 (knob, Mechanical:Mechanical_Shape) typed 'relay'. Classifier uses reference prefix heuristics (SP->speaker, TI->transformer, KN->relay) rather than lib_id='Mechanical:Mechanical_Shape' which should map to 'other' or 'mechanical'. These appear in statistics as 3 speakers, 3 transformers, and 1 extra relay.

findings.summary: HLK-PM03 AC-DC converter not detected as power regulator/converter; PWR_FLAG warnings on AC mains nets LINE/NEUT are over-aggressive false positives

incorrect.description: LINE and NEUT are mains AC nets driven by a passive screw terminal J1 (connector). The analyzer flags them as missing PWR_FLAG, but AC mains input nets are conventionally passive and never carry PWR_FLAG in real KiCad designs. This is the same category of issue as KH-160 (connector-powered designs). Single_pin_nets also flags LINE incorrectly because it only sees the power symbol pin, not that J1 drives it via a hierarchical net.

missed.description: A1 (HLK-PM03, lib_id=Converter_ACDC:HLK-PM03) is the main AC-DC converter providing +3.3V output, but it does not appear in power_regulators. Only U1 (AP2112K-3.3 LDO) is detected. The ACDC converter library prefix is not recognized by the regulator detector.

findings.summary: ESP32-C3, AP2112K LDO, UART interface, and LED resistor networks correctly identified

correct.description: U2 (ESP32-C3-12F) recognized as microcontroller with full pin analysis; U1 (AP2112K-3.3) correctly detected as LDO with +5V input, +3V3 output via fixed_suffix; mcu_rx/mcu_tx UART nets detected; LED current-limiting resistors (R6/R8=240ohm) on 3V3 rail correctly captured.

findings.summary: PCB analysis correct: DFM annular ring violation detected, dual ground domains identified, routing complete

correct.description: DFM tier correctly escalated to 'advanced' due to 0.1mm annular ring (standard limit 0.125mm); dual ground domains (GNDD and GND_CUT) correctly identified for mains isolation design; 91 footprints, 460 track segments, 92 vias, 66 zones, routing_complete=true all accurate; decoupling placement analysis populated for ICs.

findings.summary: Mechanical-only enclosure PCB correctly handled with no false DFM violations

correct.description: Top plate PCB has 0 tracks, 0 nets, 4 footprints (mounting holes only). Analyzer correctly reports routing_complete=true, DFM tier 'standard' with 0 violations — no spurious errors on a purely mechanical board.
